name: German Dumplings (Erdapfelknodeln)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup stale bread or cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Stir in the beaten egg, mashed potatoes, grated Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Gradually add enough milk to the mixture of eggs, potatoes, and cheeses until it forms a paste.
4. Add bread or cracker crumbs to create a dough; mix thoroughly.
5. Shape the mixture into small balls.
6. Cook the dumplings in boiling salted water for 5 minutes.
7. Serve the dumplings in hot beef bouillon.
